title: Project Timeline
subtitle: Our journey to make Nepali documents accessible
ctaBody: Be part of our mission to make Nepali information more accessible.

events.title: Project Launch
events.description: NepalDocs was launched with the vision of making Nepali documents searchable and accessible.

events.title: Translation Feature Added
events.description: Introduced automatic English to Nepali translation for seamless searching.

events.title: Document Viewer Enhanced
events.description: Added support for rich content including images, tables, and formatted text with highlighting.

events.title: Mobile Optimization
events.description: Fully optimized the platform for mobile devices with responsive design and touch-friendly interface.

events.title: Dark Mode & Accessibility
events.description: Implemented dark mode and enhanced accessibility features for better user experience.

events.title: AI-Powered Search
events.description: Planning to introduce AI-powered semantic search for more accurate and context-aware results.
